ring.$description: Focus ring — 2px offset outline for all focusable elements

primary.$description: Default icon color on light backgrounds — navigation, lists, labels

track-border.$description: Bottom border under the whole tabs strip

ring.$description: Border ring around avatars in stacks

separator-dot.$description: Dot separator — accent color, used as a 3×3 shape instead of the middot glyph

ellipsis.$description: Ellipsis (…) color for collapsed middle levels

info.$description: 'Showing X of Y' info text + 'Per page' label

highlight.$description: Background behind query-matching substrings in options
